name: mini-erp-backend
description: Mini ERP System Phase 1 - Backend REST API

scripts.test:all: npm run seed:fresh && node seed/index.js && node seed/run_tests.js
scripts.seed:fresh: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const mongoose=require('mongoose'); mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGO_URI).then(async ()=>{ const models=['users','products','inventories','customers','vendors','salesorders','deliveries','purchaseorders','goodsreceipts','workcenters','billofmaterials','manufacturingorders','workorders','auditlogs','inventorymovements']; for(const m of models){ try{ await mongoose.connection.collection(m).deleteMany({}); }catch(e){} } console.log('DB cleared'); mongoose.disconnect(); })"
